name: Stripe
description: Stripe is a complete payments platform. Process payments, manage subscriptions, send invoices, and handle the full commerce lifecycle with a unified API.

capabilities.name: payment_intents_create
capabilities.description: Create a PaymentIntent to initiate a payment flow. Supports various payment methods.

capabilities.name: payment_intents_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a PaymentIntent by ID.

capabilities.name: payment_intents_list
capabilities.description: List PaymentIntents with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: payment_intents_update
capabilities.description: Update a PaymentIntent's amount, metadata, or other properties.

capabilities.name: payment_intents_confirm
capabilities.description: Confirm a PaymentIntent to attempt payment.

capabilities.name: payment_intents_capture
capabilities.description: Capture a previously authorized PaymentIntent.

capabilities.name: payment_intents_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a PaymentIntent.

capabilities.name: payment_methods_create
capabilities.description: Create a PaymentMethod (card, bank account, etc.).

capabilities.name: payment_methods_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a PaymentMethod by ID.

capabilities.name: payment_methods_list
capabilities.description: List PaymentMethods for a customer.

capabilities.name: payment_methods_attach
capabilities.description: Attach a PaymentMethod to a Customer.

capabilities.name: payment_methods_detach
capabilities.description: Detach a PaymentMethod from a Customer.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new customer with email, name, and payment info.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a customer by ID.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List customers with optional email filter.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update a customer's email, name, metadata, or default payment method.

capabilities.name: customers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a customer and cancel all active subscriptions.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Create a subscription for a customer with one or more price items.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a subscription by ID.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List subscriptions with optional customer or status filter.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Update a subscription (change plan, add items, update billing).

capabilities.name: subscriptions_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a subscription immediately or at period end.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Create a draft invoice for a customer.

capabilities.name: invoices_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve an invoice by ID.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List invoices with optional customer or status filter.

capabilities.name: invoices_finalize
capabilities.description: Finalize a draft invoice so it can be paid.

capabilities.name: invoices_pay
capabilities.description: Pay an open invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_send
capabilities.description: Send a finalized invoice to the customer via email.

capabilities.name: invoices_void
capabilities.description: Void an open invoice so it can no longer be paid.

capabilities.name: products_create
capabilities.description: Create a new product for use with prices and subscriptions.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a product by ID.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: List all products.

capabilities.name: products_update
capabilities.description: Update a product's name, description, or metadata.

capabilities.name: products_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a product (must have no active prices).

capabilities.name: prices_create
capabilities.description: Create a price for a product (one-time or recurring).

capabilities.name: prices_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a price by ID.

capabilities.name: prices_list
capabilities.description: List prices with optional product or type filter.

capabilities.name: prices_update
capabilities.description: Update a price's metadata or active status.

capabilities.name: charges_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a charge by ID.

capabilities.name: charges_list
capabilities.description: List charges with optional customer or payment intent filter.

capabilities.name: refunds_create
capabilities.description: Create a refund for a charge or payment intent.

capabilities.name: refunds_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a refund by ID.

capabilities.name: refunds_list
capabilities.description: List refunds.

capabilities.name: balance_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current account balance.

capabilities.name: balance_transactions_list
capabilities.description: List balance transactions (funds movements) with filtering.

capabilities.name: balance_transactions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific balance transaction.

capabilities.name: payouts_create
capabilities.description: Create a payout to send funds to your bank account.

capabilities.name: payouts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a payout by ID.

capabilities.name: payouts_list
capabilities.description: List payouts.

capabilities.name: checkout_sessions_create
capabilities.description: Create a Checkout Session for a hosted payment page.

capabilities.name: checkout_sessions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a Checkout Session by ID.

capabilities.name: checkout_sessions_list
capabilities.description: List Checkout Sessions.

capabilities.name: checkout_sessions_expire
capabilities.description: Expire an open Checkout Session so it can no longer be completed.
